rules: Treat all members and staff with respect. Harassment or hate speech = **instant ban**.
Any scam attempt will result in a **permanent ban** and report to Discord Trust & Safety.
Initiating a chargeback after receiving your product is fraud. Legal action may be taken.
Do not spam messages, emojis, or pings. Use appropriate channels.
No advertising other servers or services without Admin permission.
Use English in all public channels so staff can moderate effectively.
All sales are **final**. Refunds only if product was not delivered. Contact support within **24 hours**.
Most orders are delivered within **1–24 hours**. If delayed, open a ticket.
New members must verify to access the full server.
Staff decisions are final. If you disagree, open a ticket — don't argue publicly.
